text.title: ai-content-strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-content-strategy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Generic: "According to industry reports..." / "Best practices include..." / No specific numbers / No author perspective / No contrarian viewpoint.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: This is what AI produces when given a topic without additional context. Every competitor's AI generates the same content. No E-E-A-T signals means Google treats it as low-quality.
